description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named log4cxx that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job that builds and tests on multiple operating systems (ubuntu18-gcc, ubuntu18-clang, osx, windows-2019) with different compilers (g++, clang++, cl.exe). For each job, check out the repository, set up the shell environment with the specified compiler, configure dependencies, and run cmake and unit tests.
